title: BEM-847 protocol decision route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:23 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem846_finalize_agreed_protocol_table.json')
decision=prev.get('decision','UNKNOWN')
if decision=='APPROVED':
    status='protocol_approved_resume_roadmap'
    next_action='resume roadmap implementation using BEM-846 agreed protocol as source of truth'
elif decision=='CHANGE_REQUIRED':
    status='protocol_change_required'
    next_action='extract Claude requested changes and patch protocol before roadmap resume'
elif decision=='BLOCKED':
    status='protocol_blocked'
    next_action='extract blocker and repair transport/runtime/protocol before roadmap resume'
else:
    status='protocol_decision_unknown'
    next_action='inspect BEM-845 draft and Claude response manually in repo, then fix decision extraction'
state={'bem':'BEM-847','status':status,'decision':decision,'protocol':prev.get('protocol'),'source_draft':prev.get('source_draft'),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem847_route_after_protocol_decision.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem847_route_after_protocol_decision.md').write_text('# BEM-847 | Route After Protocol Decision | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-847'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem847_route_after_protocol_decision.json','governance/reports/bem847_route_after_protocol_decision.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-846 protocol decision to either resume roadmap or process Claude changes/blockers')
"""
